docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF HIROTAKE KOMATSU. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT MOHAMED SOLIMAN. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KOMATSU, HIROTAKE AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIMAN, MOHAMED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-26-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HIROTAKE KOMATSU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MOHAMED SOLIMAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
